DA FONSECA: NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BAINES GROUP INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The demurrer is ordered off calendar. Plaintiff's counsel failed to respond to defendant's counsel's meet and confer efforts. (See Ravano Dec. para. 2(b).) Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with Code of Civil Procedure, sec. 430.41. Defendant's time to respond to the complaint is now October 10, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca: Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BAINES GROUP INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to strike is ordered off calendar. Plaintiff's counsel failed to respond to defendant's counsel's meet and confer efforts. (See Ravano Dec. para. 2(b).) Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with Code of Civil Procedure, sec. 435.5. Defendant's time to respond to the complaint is now October 10, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
